title: District Panchayat Kabirdham – Accounts cum MIS Assistant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: District Panchayat Kabirdham (DP Kabirdham) has released 1 Accounts cum MIS Assistant vacancy. Eligible candidates with a Graduate degree in Commerce and a One-year Diploma in Computer can apply offline until 17 April 2026 at www.kawardha.gov.in
